name.description: Team name — used in paths, so tight charset

purpose.description: One-line description shown in dashboard header

context_files.description: Repo-relative files to stage into the run dir's context/ so agents can read them (the sandbox blocks them from reading outside their worktree by default)

parallel.description: Run agents in parallel (true) or sequentially (false)

max_iterations_per_agent.description: Safety cap; each agent self-declares done with AGENT_DONE

name.description: Agent name — validated pattern (used in paths, git branch names)

motivation.description: Shown in dashboard card, sent to the agent in its initial prompt

context_files.description: Per-agent context files (in addition to team-level context_files)

permissions.description: Additional --allowed-tools values to pass to claude CLI
